WhyItMatters: Reviews post-authentication SaaS activity, file movement, sharing, unmanaged device access, and session behavior.
ReviewSteps: Review cloud app activity after suspicious successful authentication.
Look for downloads, uploads, sharing, anonymous links, or unusual apps.
Compare cloud activity to device trust and Conditional Access outcome.
Validate DLP visibility for sensitive data movement.
Review Defender for Cloud Apps session policy coverage.
ExpectedResults: Rows may show SaaS activity, file access, sharing, downloads, uploads, or session events.
NoResultsMeaning: No cloud app telemetry was returned or CloudAppEvents is unavailable.
RecommendedActions: Validate user intent and business context.
Review Conditional Access App Control coverage.
Review DLP policy visibility and Defender for Cloud Apps policies.
